mapper.sql: operation_id, scope, workspace_id, action, status, current_step, error_code, error_message, trace_id, branch, commit_hash, created_at, updated_at
worktree_id, scope, workspace_id, linux_server_id, worktree_name, branch, root_path, created_by_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: update agent_config_operations set scope = #{scope}, workspace_id = #{workspaceId}, action = #{action}, status = #{status}, current_step = #{currentStep}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, trace_id = #{traceId}, branch = #{branch}, commit_hash = #{commitHash}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where operation_id = #{operationId}

update agent_config_worktrees set scope = #{scope}, workspace_id = #{workspaceId}, linux_server_id = #{linuxServerId}, worktree_name = #{worktreeName}, branch = #{branch}, root_path = #{rootPath}, created_by_user_id = #{createdByUserId}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where worktree_id = #{worktreeId}
